description: A receiving clerk needs to log an incoming shipment of components from a supplier.

nodes.task_description: Scan the packing slip to retrieve the corresponding purchase order.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent scans the document and the system displays the correct PO.

nodes.task_description: Count the received items and check for any damage.

expected_outcome.expected: Clerk physically counts the items and visually inspects them.

nodes.task_description: Record the received quantity against the purchase order, noting a partial shipment.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent enters the received quantity, and the PO status is updated to 'Partially Received'.
